images/hero_exu.png: Black and white illustration of the character Exu sitting on the ground leaning against a tree trunk, seen in profile. He has a completely dark silhouette, irregular dreadlocks pointing upwards, and glowing red eyes.
images/hero_kite.png: Black and white illustration of a flying geometric kite with a long tail, drawn in a rustic and stylized style.
images/michael_feitosa.png: Portrait of Michael Feitosa. A man with a dark beard and mustache, wearing a gray t-shirt, a blue earring, and a white cap with the inscription '& Quiet'. He looks thoughtfully to the left.
images/tejo_icon.png: Minimalist icon of the Tejo Estúdio logo.
images/tejo_logo_black.png: Full Tejo Estúdio logo in black, with stylized letters.
images/vem_exu_logo_black.png: Logo for the game 'Vem, Exu!' in black. The text features irregular, rustic typography, with a spiral drawn in the center of the 'X'.
images/portfolio/hamilton.png: Cover for the game 'Hamilton Loop Puzzle'. Light background imitating crumpled paper, with the game's title in black letters in the center. There is a puzzle outline on the screen and a mouse cursor pointing to a hexagon with an 'X'.
images/portfolio/maria_da_lua.png: Black and white illustration under a starry night sky with a large full moon. It shows two characters: a man with a wolf-like appearance and a girl in a dress with extremely voluminous hair holding a bouquet of flowers.
images/portfolio/sina_de_sia.png: Screenshot from the game 'Sina de Siá' in grayscale. It shows a platform made of dotted blocks inside a geometric cave. A dark lizard walks on the platform and a pale hand rises mysteriously from the scenery.
images/portfolio/vem_exu.png: Vertical poster for the game 'Vem, Exu!' in black and white. The character Exu appears sleeping leaning against a large tree on the right, with 'Z z z' floating above him. In the sky in the background, there is a stylized sun, clouds, and a flying kite. At the bottom, the logos of cultural sponsors (Governo do Ceará, Fortaleza, Lei Paulo Gustavo).
press-kit/vem-exu/01_media/keyart/key_ar: A black and white key art of Exu holding a kite string, sitting under a tree with background clouds and foliage. His glowing red eyes are the only color.
A black and white key art of Exu sitting under a tree with his kite. Features the 'Vem, Exu!' logo, 'Wishlist on Steam' text, and Steam/Google Play icons.
A black and white key art of Exu sitting under a tree with his kite. Features the 'Vem, Exu!' logo, 'Wishlist na Steam' text, and Steam/Google Play icons.
press-kit/vem-exu/01_media/screenshots/v: Exu's glowing red eyes against a starry background counting stars, with a hand cursor pointing at them.
Exu trying to sleep, surrounded by annoying snoring bubbles and musical notes.
A glowing bird constellation in a dark starry sky, from the counting stars scene, showing a hand cursor clicking on a star.
Exu's glowing red eyes looking at a kite formed by stars in the night sky, from the counting shapes in the stars scene.
A collage of three framed polaroid-style photos showing Taio sleeping and snoring, while Exu looks upset. Exu's red eyes watch from the darkness.
A speech bubble containing a drawing of Exu asking about the kite.
A black and white drawing showing Taio explaining about the kite, held by dark hands.
Exu looking for items in a dark forest, collecting a glowing white leaf.
Exu and Taio's dark hands holding strings, flying their kites high in a bright sky.
Three comic panels showing Exu fighting with his brother Taio over a kite.
Exu floating in a dark starry space, surrounded by several small moons and planets.
press-kit/vem-exu/02_branding/characters: Full body character portrait of Exu, a young boy with dark skin, spiky hair, a loincloth, and glowing red eyes.
Full body character portrait of Taio, a young boy with dark skin and a white square pattern painted on his short hair.
Full body character portrait of the Mother, a tall dark figure covered in flowing, wavy line patterns.
press-kit/vem-exu/02_branding/logos/tejo: The TEJO estúdio logo in black text, featuring a pink slanted square above the 'J'.
The TEJO estúdio logo in white text, featuring a pink slanted square above the 'J'.
